title: Wearable Spyglass (Trinket)
description: Renders your Spyglass on your body when equipped in the trinket slot. Using V you can use your spyglass and zoom if equipped in the trinket slot.
body:
Wearable Spyglass lets you equip a spyglass in your belt slot as a Trinket, keeping it ready on your hip without taking up a hand slot.                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  When equipped, hold V to look through it with full zoom and scroll wheel control — just like using it normally, but hands-free. The spyglass renders as a 3D model on your character in one of four hip positions: left/right,    
  front/back. Sneaking works naturally without clipping.                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                           
  All zoom tweaks (FOV, mouse sensitivity, input handling) also apply when using a spyglass held in hand.                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  Requires: Trinkets
